programmes.show_description: Chris And Vince. Paul Mackie and the team try to find the causes of a two-year dry streak that threatens to end the dreams of rookie prospectors Chris Moore and Vince Federici. S1, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
